fault_hypothesis: When the updated counter exceeds the cap, it is incorrectly set to `cap - 1` on line 64, instead of being clamped to `cap`.

constraints.intent: The value after clamping should be exactly the cap.
The value assigned to updated when clamping occurs must be the cap itself.

spec.expr: cap is None or not (updated__1 > cap) or updated__3 == cap

constraints.intent: If the pre-clamped value exceeded the cap, the final value must equal the cap.
